---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new instrument, authority, schema change, or capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to accomplish that PubLedge does not currently support? Describe the use case, not the solution.

## Proposed solution

The shape of the change you have in mind. For schema or protocol changes, reference the relevant section of `PROTOCOL.md` or `_workshop/CONTENT-GUIDE.md`.

## Scope

- [ ] New instrument record
- [ ] New authority
- [ ] New instrument type
- [ ] New obligation / mapping
- [ ] Schema / frontmatter change (v0.2 or future)
- [ ] Build pipeline change
- [ ] MCP tool addition
- [ ] Agent-readiness surface (JSON-LD, feed, sitemap, etc.)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you ruled out and why.

## Source material (for content additions)

If proposing a new instrument, list:

- Authority + instrument type
- Official URL or publication citation
- Jurisdiction
- Whether the source is public record, redacted, or paywalled

## Prior art

Is there an analogous instrument already in the registry that this should mirror? Link it.
